def test_local_commits_rebased_onto_new_upstream():
        """Local commits should be descendants of the new upstream HEAD."""
        result = run_jj(["log", "--no-graph",
                         "-r", "local-branch & descendants(main)",
                         "-T", 'description ++ "\n"'])
